## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] Ran relevant tests
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` for code changes
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated refactors
- [ ] No secrets, private learner data, local databases, or generated build outputs are included
- [ ] Schema, persistence, export, and UI changes are kept in sync when generated course fields change
